headline: SIGNAL SCAN — Apr 18, 2026
telegramText: SIGNAL SCAN — April 18, 2026 SNAPSHOT Risk-on surge as Iran reopens Strait of Hormuz after imposing vessel tolls, sparking global relief rally.
